positive: A vibrant, whimsical celestial map illustration featuring a stylized central constellation of glowing geometric shapes and interconnected cosmic flora. The overall style is high-contrast neo-art deco meets natural biology. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, rich gold, and emerald green for a jewel-toned palette. The composition should be highly symmetrical and designed as a repeating surface pattern, suitable for apparel. Elements include stylized crescent moons, abstract planetary rings, glowing nebula smoke trails that frame the central subject, and meticulously detailed cosmic vines curling around the geometric constellation lines. Clean silhouettes and bold linework are essential. Flat lay composition, graphic design style, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, noisy, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, cartoonish, photorealism
